summary: Implemented apply-mode pr_open expansion in issue-to-merge-github. scripts/specbridge.ps1 now calls gh pr create when pr_open is selected and all evidence gates pass, with ErrorActionPreference guard for gh stderr. Pilot scope guard updated to allow issue_close and pr_open (blocker: apply_mode_pilot_supports_issue_close_and_pr_open_only for unsupported ops). apply-unsupported-op test updated to use merge operation. Documentation updated with pr_open section. All issue 123 artifacts created.
policy_result: Compliant. pr_open uses same evidence-gate pattern as issue_close. ErrorActionPreference guard applied. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment files changed.
risk_result: Medium risk. gh pr create opens a real PR on GitHub but is bounded by all 7 evidence gates and explicit confirmation flags.
unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 123 branch.
apply-mode pr_open execution will be tested in issue 123 post-merge closure after evidence file is updated with github_ci_passed: true.
merge_status: PR pending. Issue 123 branch pushed; PR to be opened at https://github.com/yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge.
